nasb.text: The herdsmen ran away, and went to the city and reported everything, including what had happened to the demoniacs.

esv.text: The herdsmen fled, and going into the city they told everything, especially what had happened to the demon-possessed men.

cnv.text: 放豬的人逃進城裡，把被鬼附的人的遭遇和一切事情，都報告出來。

ccb.text: 放猪的人逃进城，把事情的经过以及被鬼附身者的遭遇告诉了城里的人。

csbs.text: 那些放猪的人就逃跑，进城去传报了这一切事，包括鬼魔附身之人的事。
